caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top with small red floral patterns and a decorative embroidered neckline, paired with a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the top-left frame, she looks slightly to her right with a neutral expression. In the top-right frame, she begins to smile and tilt her head. By the bottom-left frame, she has a soft smile and is looking further to the right. In the final bottom-right frame, she continues speaking with a pleasant facial expression. A small circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom-left corner of each frame. The camera remains static throughout, focusing on the woman from the chest up as she speaks.
